title: Upgrade From Release A Day Ago
objective: Clone existing OpenClaw user state, move the clone to the published OpenClaw version current roughly one day ago, then upgrade the same clone to the target and verify migration, plugin index, runtime deps, and gateway health.

snapshots.label: pre-upgrade
snapshots.summary: Bounded redacted OpenClaw state before target upgrade

snapshots.label: post-upgrade
snapshots.summary: Bounded redacted OpenClaw state after target upgrade

phases.title: Clone Existing Env
phases.intent: Clone a durable existing env into a disposable Kova env before any rolling source runtime or target upgrade action.

phases.title: Move Clone To Day-Ago Release
phases.intent: Resolve the OpenClaw npm version published at or before one day ago and bind the cloned env to it before the target upgrade.

phases.title: Upgrade To Target
phases.intent: Run the real target upgrade path through OCM and verify post-upgrade service reconciliation.

phases.title: Post-Upgrade OpenClaw Checks
phases.intent: Verify OpenClaw state after upgrade, including plugin install index, plugin command behavior, doctor recovery, and gateway logs.
